name: chr6p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 6 p-arm pericentric flank (6p11.1-6p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr6 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D6Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline.
